tree.setup: An airport terminal. You're sitting at Gate 12 when an announcement says your flight has moved to Gate 28 -- at the opposite end of the terminal. An airline staff member, Xiao Song, is standing near the gate with a walkie-talkie and the calm composure of someone who has redirected thousands of confused passengers.
tree.setup_zh: 机场航站楼。你坐在12号登机口，广播说航班换到28号登机口——在航站楼另一头。航空公司的工作人员小宋拿着对讲机站在登机口旁边，一脸从容，引导过上千个困惑的旅客。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 您好，去北京的航班换到28号登机口了。往那边走。
turns.text_pinyin: nín hǎo, qù běijīng de hángbān huàn dào èrshíbā hào dēngjīkǒu le. wǎng nàbiān zǒu.
turns.text_en: Hello, the Beijing flight has moved to Gate 28. Walk that way.

options.text_zh: 28号登机口远不远？飞机几点起飞？
options.text_pinyin: èrshíbā hào dēngjīkǒu yuǎn bu yuǎn? fēijī jǐ diǎn qǐfēi?
options.text_en: Is Gate 28 far? What time does the plane depart?
options.feedback: Xiao Song checks her list.「走路大概十分钟。起飞时间没变，还是三点半。不用跑。」远不远 asks about distance. 起飞 is 'take off.'
Xiao Song smiles with polished diplomacy.「机场调整。」She doesn't know the real reason either. Nobody ever does. 为什么 is 'why.'
「目前没有延误。」Xiao Song says this with the cautious optimism of someone who has seen things change at the last minute. 会不会 asks about possibility.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 别担心，时间够的。您慢慢走过去就行。
turns.text_pinyin: bié dānxīn, shíjiān gòu de. nín mànman zǒu guòqù jiù xíng.
turns.text_en: Don't worry, there's enough time. Just walk over at your own pace.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Thank her and head to the new gate.

options.text_pinyin: xièxie! èrshíbā hào wǎng yòu zǒu duì ba?
options.text_en: Thanks! Gate 28 is to the right, correct?
options.feedback: Xiao Song points right and nods.「对，一直走，跟着指示牌就行。」Confirming direction before walking prevents another detour. 跟着 means 'follow.'
Xiao Song nods and turns to the next confused passenger. She'll be doing this for another three hours.

options.text_zh: 可以帮我看一下行李吗？我去找咖啡。
options.text_pinyin: kěyǐ bāng wǒ kàn yíxià xíngli ma? wǒ qù zhǎo kāfēi.
options.text_en: Can you watch my luggage? I need to find coffee.
options.feedback: Xiao Song blinks. Your flight leaves in 90 minutes and you just changed gates and now you want coffee.「先去登机口吧，那边也有咖啡。」Priorities.

tree.cultural_note: Gate changes (换登机口) are common in Chinese airports. Announcements are made in Chinese and English. Always check the departure screens (航班信息屏). 指示牌 (zhǐshìpái) are the directional signs -- follow them.
